title: What episode is this from
wikitext:
[]: What episode is this from?             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Wed Dec 03, 2008 5:36 pm Sorry if there's a thread like this, or it's the wrong place to post, but I was curious about something. I really like Rei's expression on the left side of this wallpaper; does anyone know what episode it's from? http://people.msoe.edu/~brayshaj/files/rei_wallpaper_01.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Dec 03, 2008 5:37 pm I believe it was when Rei was preparing to run after Sahaquiel. I'm guessing though.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Dec 03, 2008 5:39 pm It may have been recycled, but it's during Sahaquiel, around 19:26, after they've caught the Angel and Shinji shouts "Do it now!"

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Wed Dec 03, 2008 5:43 pm Perfect. Thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by Count A'ight » Wed Dec 03, 2008 7:11 pm Don't forget that she makes the same expression, albeit at a different angle, when she throws the Lancea Longini at Arael.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed Dec 03, 2008 11:55 pm Rei vs Sahaquiel, episode 12

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Thu Dec 04, 2008 12:03 am The image is now my avatar, meaning I figured out where it was. Thanks, guys. =)
